query:
-- Count Telstra services by status
SELECT provider, status, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost, SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra'
GROUP BY provider, status;

-- Check what date/period columns exist in services
SHOW COLUMNS FROM services;
